sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for BLUE_1717_TOP_SHEET, part number MSV-200001, supplied by ㈜케이원코퍼레이션 to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supplier part approval documentation including revision history, material list, QC process control plan, inspection criteria, and packaging specification.
keyPoints: Product name is BLUE_1717_TOP_SHEET and part number/model number is MSV-200001.
Applicable models are G1717CW and G1717CWP.
Supplier approval dates and related control plan dates are listed as 2025.03.12.
Raw material list identifies Polyolefin Foams EVJ63=1001W from 영보화학.
QC process includes receiving inspection, lamination, punching, cutting, inspection/packing, shipping inspection, and shipment.
Packaging specification is common for H&abyz deliveries and defines small packaging, box sizes, and stacking limits.
